Script.name: GaldamUI
Script.script:
GaldamUI = GaldamUI or {} if GaldamUI._handlers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI._handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end GaldamUI._handlers = {} local PANEL_W = 0.20 -- 우측 탭 패널 폭 local BOTTOM_H = 108 -- 하단 HUD 바 높이 -- 커스텀 이미지 GaldamUI.imgDir = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamui" pcall(function() lfs.mkdir(GaldamUI.imgDir) end) local IMGBASE = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Binkaze/galdamoosound@main/" local IMGFILES = {"up-arrow.png","down arrow.png","left-arrow.png","right-arrow.png","up.png","down.png","in.png","out.png","look.png","search.png", "status_cold.png","status_heat.png","status_wet.png","status_drunk.png","status_caffeine.png","status_smoke.png","status_nausea.png", "status_bleeding.png","status_stunned.png","status_broken.png","status_hunger.png","status_thirst.png","status_fatigue.png","status_heavy.png"} local function imgPath(f) return GaldamUI.imgDir .. "/" .. f end local function imgTag(f, sz) return "
" end GaldamUI.imgTag = imgTag; GaldamUI.imgPath = imgPath local CSS_BTN = "background-color: rgba(34,84,116,205); border:2px solid #4fa3c7; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_ACT = "background-color: rgba(38,70,48,215); border:2px solid #5fae6f; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_OFF = "background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0.42 rgba(20,13,15,255), stop:0.46 #cc2b2b, stop:0.54 #cc2b2b, stop:0.58 rgba(20,13,15,255)); border:2px solid #7a2e2e; border-radius:6px; color:#9a7478; font-size:18px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" -- 상태 아이콘: 한글 이름(툴팁) + severity 색(경고/심함/위험) GaldamUI.STNAME = {cold="추위/저체온", heat="더위", wet="젖음", drunk="취함", caffeine="카페인", smoke="흡연", nausea="메스꺼움", bleeding="출혈", stunned="감전/기절", broken="골절", hunger="배고픔", thirst="목마름", fatigue="피로", heavy="과적재"} GaldamUI.STSEV = {[1]={b="#f1c40f", bg="rgba(60,52,12,210)"}, [2]={b="#e67e22", bg="rgba(72,42,12,215)"}, [3]={b="#e74c3c", bg="rgba(74,20,20,225)"}} function GaldamUI.downloadImages() for _, f in ipairs(IMGFILES) do local lp = imgPath(f) if not (io.exists and io.exists(lp)) then downloadFile(lp, IMGBASE .. (f:gsub(" ", "%%20"))) end end end -- ===== 탭 정의 (확장형: 여기에 항목만 추가하면 새 탭 생성) ===== -- key=식별자, name=표시이름, render=콘텐츠 그리기 함수명(문자열로 늦은 바인딩) GaldamUI.TABS = { {key="players", name="접속자", icon=nil, render="renderPlayers"}, {key="skills", name="스킬", icon=nil, render="renderSkills"}, {key="help", name="도움말", icon=nil, render="renderHelp"}, {key="events", name="이벤트", icon=nil, render="renderEvents"}, } function GaldamUI.build() -- 기존 정리 (구버전 우측 HUD 요소 포함 — 재로드 시 잔재 제거) for _, k in ipairs({"bottom","rpanel","panel","info","dpad","act","statusBar"}) do if GaldamUI[k] then pcall(function() GaldamUI[k]:hide() end) end end -- ===== 하단 HUD 바 (전체폭, 최하단) ===== GaldamUI.bottom = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamBottom", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=BOTTOM_H}) -- 상태 아이콘 슬롯 (작은 셀, onStatus 에서 px 배치) GaldamUI.statusSlots = {} for i = 1, 14 do local s = Geyser.Label:new({name="stSlot"..i, x=4, y=2, width=34, height=34}, GaldamUI.bottom) s:hide(); GaldamUI.statusSlots[i] = s end -- 게이지 4 (가로, 좌측 78%) GaldamUI.gauges = {} local function gauge(name, label, color, gx) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({name=name, x=gx, y=44, width="19%", height=56}, GaldamUI.bottom) g.front:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..color.."; border-radius:5px;") g.back:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px;") g.text:setStyleSheet("color:#ffffff; font-size:18px; padding-left:6px;") g:setValue(100,100,""..label..""); return g end GaldamUI.hp = gauge("GaldamHP", "체력", "#c0392b", "1%") GaldamUI.thirst = gauge("GaldamThi", "목마름", "#2471a3", "20.5%") GaldamUI.hunger = gauge("GaldamHun", "배고픔", "#d68910", "40%") GaldamUI.stress = gauge("GaldamStr", "스트레스", "#f1c40f", "59.5%") -- ===== 우측 탭 패널 ===== GaldamUI.rpanel = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamRPanel", x="-"..PANEL_W*100 .."%", y=0, width=PANEL_W*100 .."%", height="100%"}) -- 위치 헤더 GaldamUI.locHeader = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamLoc", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=40}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.locHeader:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#cfe8f0; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.locHeader:echo("
갯담마을
") -- 탭 버튼 행 GaldamUI.tabBtns = {} local n = #GaldamUI.TABS for i, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local bw = math.floor(100 / n) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name="tab_"..t.key, x=((i-1)*bw) .."%", y=44, width=(bw-1) .."%", height=38}, GaldamUI.rpanel) b:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.selectTab(t.key) end) pcall(function() b:setToolTip(""..t.name.."") end) GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] = b end -- 콘텐츠 (스크롤 가능) GaldamUI.content = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({name="GaldamTabContent", x=0, y=88, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.content:setColor(14, 18, 26) pcall(function() GaldamUI.content:setFontSize(11) end) GaldamUI.content:setWrap(28) -- ===== d-pad 미니창 (드래그) ===== pcall(function() if GaldamUI.dpadWin then GaldamUI.dpadWin:hide() end GaldamUI.dpadWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담이동", width=176, height=190, x=30, y=300}) end) GaldamUI.dirBtns = {} local function dbtn(nm, name, img, cmd, aliases, x, y) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=y, width=50, height=50}, GaldamUI.dpadWin) b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); b:echo(imgTag(img, 34)) pcall(function() b:setToolTip(""..name.."") end) table.insert(GaldamUI.dirBtns, {btn=b, aliases=aliases, img=img, name=name}) return b end dbtn("dpUp", "위(올라가기)", "up.png", "올라가기", {"올라가기","up","u","위","상"}, 4, 4) dbtn("dpN", "북", "up-arrow.png", "북", {"북","north","n"}, 60, 4) dbtn("dpIn", "들어가기", "in.png", "들어가기", {"들어가기","in","enter","안","입구"}, 116, 4) dbtn("dpW", "서", "left-arrow.png", "서", {"서","west","w"}, 4, 58) dbtn("dpE", "동", "right-arrow.png", "동", {"동","east","e"}, 116, 58) dbtn("dpDn", "아래(내려가기)","down.png", "내려가기", {"내려가기","down","d","아래","하"}, 4, 112) dbtn("dpS", "남", "down arrow.png", "남", {"남","south","s"}, 60, 112) dbtn("dpOut", "나가기", "out.png", "나가기", {"나가기","out","밖","출구","exit"}, 116, 112) GaldamUI.lookBtn = Geyser.Label:new({name="dpLook", x=60, y=58, width=50, height=50}, GaldamUI.dpadWin) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 34)) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setClickCallback(function() send("look") end) pcall(function() GaldamUI.lookBtn:setToolTip("둘러보기") end) -- 수배 오버레이 (좌상단) if GaldamUI.wanted then GaldamUI.wanted:hide() end GaldamUI.wanted = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamWan", x="-43%", y=4, width="20%", height=66}) GaldamUI.wanted:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(22,14,28,235); border:1px solid #5a3a6a; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.wanted:hide() GaldamUI.cycleGen = (GaldamUI.cycleGen or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = 0 GaldamUI.cycleStep(GaldamUI.cycleGen) -- 지도창 pcall(function() if not GaldamUI.mapWin then GaldamUI.mapWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담지도", width=520, height=430, x=900, y=300}) end GaldamUI.mapWin:setFontSize(14) GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음") end) GaldamUI.built = true GaldamUI.activeTab = GaldamUI.activeTab or "players" GaldamUI.relayout() GaldamUI.selectTab(GaldamUI.activeTab) end function GaldamUI.relayout() if not GaldamUI.built then return end local w, h = getMainWindowSize() local rw = math.floor(w * PANEL_W) setBorderRight(rw); setBorderBottom(BOTTOM_H) pcall(function() GaldamUI.bottom:move(0, h - BOTTOM_H); GaldamUI.bottom:resize(w, BOTTOM_H) GaldamUI.rpanel:move(w - rw, 0); GaldamUI.rpanel:resize(rw, h - BOTTOM_H) GaldamUI.content:resize("100%", (h - BOTTOM_H) - 92) end) end function GaldamUI.setExits(elist) if not GaldamUI.dirBtns then return end local avail = {} for _, e in ipairs(elist or {}) do avail[tostring(e)] = true end for _, d in ipairs(GaldamUI.dirBtns) do local on = false for _, al in ipairs(d.aliases) do if avail[al] then on = true; break end end if on then d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); d.btn:echo(imgTag(d.img, 34)) pcall(function() d.btn:setToolTip(""..d.name.."") end) else d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_OFF) d.btn:echo("
"..d.name.."
") pcall(function() d.btn:setToolTip(""..d.name.."
막힌 길") end) end end end -- ===== 탭 전환 / 렌더 ===== function GaldamUI.selectTab(key) if not GaldamUI.built then return end GaldamUI.activeTab = key for _, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local b = GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] if b then if t.key == key then b:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT) else b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN) end if t.icon then b:echo(imgTag(t.icon, 28)) else b:echo("
"..t.name.."
") end end end GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderTab() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.content) then return end for _, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do if t.key == GaldamUI.activeTab then local fn = GaldamUI[t.render] if fn then pcall(fn) else GaldamUI.content:clear(); GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n (미구현)") end return end end end function GaldamUI.renderPlayers() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 접속 중\n\n") local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Players local cnt = 0 if d and d.list and d.list ~= "" then for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, ar = entry:match("([^|]*)|(.*)") GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..(nm or entry).." "..(ar or "").."\n") cnt = cnt + 1 end end if cnt == 0 then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (목록 없음)\n") end end function GaldamUI.renderSkills() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 능력치 / 스킬\n\n") local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Skills local cnt = 0 if d and d.list and d.list ~= "" then for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, sc = entry:match("([^|]*)|(.*)") GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..(nm or entry).." "..(sc or "").."\n") cnt = cnt + 1 end end if cnt == 0 then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" 아직 배운 스킬이 없습니다.\n") end end function GaldamUI.renderHelp() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 도움말\n\n 🚧 준비 중\n 곧 명령어/도움말 목록이\n 여기에 추가됩니다.\n") end function GaldamUI.renderEvents() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 진행 중 이벤트\n\n 🚧 준비 중\n 이벤트 시스템이 구축되면\n 여기에 표시됩니다.\n") end -- ===== GMCP 핸들러 ===== function GaldamUI.onRoom() local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room if not (GaldamUI.built and r) then return end GaldamUI.locHeader:echo(string.format("
%s
%s
", r.name or "?", r.area or "")) GaldamUI.setExits(r.exits or {}) end function GaldamUI.cycleStep(gen) if gen ~= GaldamUI.cycleGen then return end GaldamUI.tick = (GaldamUI.tick or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = (GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 0.25 GaldamUI.renderWanted() tempTimer(0.1, "GaldamUI.cycleStep("..gen..")") end function GaldamUI.renderWanted() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.wanted) then return end local tier = GaldamUI.curTier or 0 if tier <= 0 then GaldamUI.wanted:hide(); return end local tick = GaldamUI.tick or 0 local bl = GaldamUI.blink if bl and tick >= bl.endTick then GaldamUI.blink = nil; bl = nil end local t = (math.sin(GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 1) / 2 local col = string.format("#%02x%02x%02x", math.floor(204+(43-204)*t), math.floor(43+(107-43)*t), math.floor(43+(204-43)*t)) local stars = "" for i = 1, 6 do local ch, c if bl and bl.set[i] then local on = (math.floor(tick / bl.interval) % 2) == 0 ch = "★" if bl.kind == "add" then c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#473807" else c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#ffffff" end elseif i <= tier then ch = "★"; c = "#f1c40f" else ch = "☆"; c = "#444444" end stars = stars .. ""..ch.."" end local lines = {} lines[#lines+1] = "수배" lines[#lines+1] = stars local h = 18 + #lines * 42 if GaldamUI.wantedH ~= h then pcall(function() GaldamUI.wanted:resize("21%", h) end); GaldamUI.wantedH = h end GaldamUI.wanted:echo("
"..table.concat(lines, "
").."
") GaldamUI.wanted:show() end function GaldamUI.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not (GaldamUI.built and v) then return end if v.hp then GaldamUI.hp:setValue(tonumber(v.hp) or 0, tonumber(v.hp_max) or 100, "체력 "..tostring(v.hp).."/"..tostring(v.hp_max).."") end if v.thirst then local t=tonumber(v.thirst) or 0; GaldamUI.thirst:setValue(math.min(t,500),500,string.format("목마름 %d",math.floor(t))) end if v.hunger then local h=tonumber(v.hunger) or 0; GaldamUI.hunger:setValue(math.min(h,500),500,string.format("배고픔 %d",math.floor(h))) end if v.stress then local s=tonumber(v.stress) or 0; GaldamUI.stress:setValue(math.min(s,500),500,string.format("스트레스 %d",math.floor(s))) end if v.wanted then local w = tonumber(v.wanted) or 0 local nt = (w>=171 and 6) or (w>=141 and 5) or (w>=101 and 4) or (w>=61 and 3) or (w>=31 and 2) or (w>=1 and 1) or 0 local prev = GaldamUI.prevTier or 0 if nt > prev then local set = {}; for i = prev+1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=5, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+30, kind="add"} elseif nt < prev and nt > 0 then local set = {}; for i = 1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=2, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+20, kind="remove"} end GaldamUI.prevTier = nt GaldamUI.curTier = nt GaldamUI.renderWanted() end end function GaldamUI.onStatus() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Status if not (GaldamUI.built and d and GaldamUI.statusSlots) then return end local list = {} for tok in tostring(d.icons or ""):gmatch("[^,]+") do local k, sv = tok:match("(%a+):(%d+)") if k then list[#list+1] = {k=k, sv=tonumber(sv) or 1} end end local cell, step = 34, 38 for i, slot in ipairs(GaldamUI.statusSlots) do local it = list[i] if it then local sev = GaldamUI.STSEV[it.sv] or GaldamUI.STSEV[1] pcall(function() slot:move(6 + (i-1)*step, 2); slot:resize(cell, cell) end) slot:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..sev.bg.."; border:2px solid "..sev.b.."; border-radius:7px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") slot:echo(imgTag("status_"..it.k..".png", 28)) pcall(function() slot:setToolTip(GaldamUI.STNAME[it.k] or it.k) end) slot:show() else slot:hide() end end end function GaldamUI.onMap() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Map if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.mapWin and d) then return end GaldamUI.mapWin:clear() if d.has == 1 and d.grid then local raw = d.grid:gsub("<>", "\27"):gsub("<>", "\n") GaldamUI.mapWin:decho(ansi2decho(raw)) else GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음 (갯담 지도 필요)") end end function GaldamUI.refresh() if not GaldamUI.built then return end pcall(function() GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 34)) end) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onStatus(); GaldamUI.renderTab() end if not GaldamUI.built then GaldamUI.build() end GaldamUI.relayout() GaldamUI.downloadImages() table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", function() GaldamUI.onRoom() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() GaldamUI.onVitals() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Status", function() GaldamUI.onStatus() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Map", function() GaldamUI.onMap() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Players", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="players" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Skills", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="skills" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", function() GaldamUI.relayout() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", function() GaldamUI.refresh() end)) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onStatus(); GaldamUI.onMap()
